tests.test_name: TestNG - PO - single test, core output structure
tests.description: Verifies that uploading a single TestNG test file produces valid, fully-resolved documentation output with at least one named test entry.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation appears in the output panel
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system returns visible output after processing the file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the output are populated — no placeholders or nulls remain
At least one test entry is generated from the uploaded file

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each test entry is identifiable by name

tests.test_name: TestNG - PO - DataProvider expands one test per row
tests.description: Verifies that a data-driven TestNG test using a DataProvider is expanded into one separate test entry per data row in the Product Owner output.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation appears in the output panel
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system returns visible output after processing the data-driven file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the expanded output are fully populated
Each DataProvider row produces its own distinct test entry

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each expanded test entry is individually named

tests.test_name: TestNG - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
tests.description: Verifies that a single TestNG test file processed for a QA Manager produces output that includes a populated test coverage matrix.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation appears in the output panel
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system returns visible output after processing the file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the output are fully populated
At least one test entry is generated

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each test entry is identifiable by name

test_coverage.verification_step: First test has a non-empty test_coverage_matrix array
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The QA Manager view includes a coverage matrix with at least one entry

tests.description: Verifies that a data-driven TestNG test processed for a QA Manager is collapsed into a single test entry, with the coverage matrix rows reflecting each data example using the correct schema.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation appears in the output panel
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system returns visible output after processing the data-driven file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the output are fully populated
Data-driven tests are collapsed into a single entry rather than expanded for this role

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The collapsed test entry is identifiable by name

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix row count matches the examples
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The number of rows in the coverage matrix corresponds to the number of DataProvider rows

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix rows use the correct schema for 'generic'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each row in the matrix conforms to the expected generic schema structure
